title: Senior Teacher - Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates:
Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates!
